critical_recommendation.action: GSC Request Indexing for 20k loan blog
critical_recommendation.justification: This is the #1 priority page. Position 7.1 (page 1), highest click potential. Major content restructure deployed Jun 25 but Google last crawled it Jun 4 — 24 days ago. The fix is invisible. A single Request Indexing via CloakBrowser GSC UI would trigger recrawl within hours. This is the single most impactful action available — it could unlock the first real content click.
critical_recommendation.risk: LOW — page is already indexed, position stable. Request Indexing only asks Google to recrawl, does not change anything.

overall_assessment.summary: DAY 3 POST-PHASE 35. The architecture repair is deployed and verified live, but Google hasn't seen any of it. The 20k loan blog — our #1 click candidate at position 7.1 — hasn't been recrawled in 24 days. Parent calculator titles are improved but tool variants still outrank them 3.5x while removals process. Impressions continue a multi-week decline (498→379). The single most impactful action right now is a GSC Request Indexing for the 20k loan blog — it's page 1, it's restructured, Google just needs to see it. Without a recrawl trigger, we're waiting for Google's natural crawl cycle which can take weeks on a low-authority domain. The scoreboard remains OFF_TRACK but the fix is deployed and waiting for Google's eyes.
overall_assessment.critical_path: 20k blog recrawl → first content click → validates architecture repair approach → expand to parent calculator recapture → sustainable growth trajectory.
